'''dhagopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headcount|headcount]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-g-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headcount|headcount]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhagopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhægepeth|dhægepeth]] || [[word:dhægepej|dhægepej]] || [[word:dhægepesh|dhægepesh]] || [[word:dhægepe|dhægepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhagogopoth|dhagogopoth]] || [[word:dhagogopoj|dhagogopoj]] || [[word:dhagogoposh|dhagogoposh]] || [[word:dhagogopo|dhagogopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhagopoth|dhagopoth]] || [[word:dhagopoj|dhagopoj]] || [[word:dhagoposh|dhagoposh]] || [[word:dhagopo|dhagopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhagofpoth|dhagofpoth]] || [[word:dhagofpoj|dhagofpoj]] || [[word:dhagofposh|dhagofposh]] || [[word:dhagofpof|dhagofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhagopotho|dhagopotho]] || [[word:dhagopojo|dhagopojo]] || [[word:dhagoposho|dhagoposho]] || [[word:dhagopoko|dhagopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhagopoth|dhagopoth]] || [[word:dhagopoj|dhagopoj]] || [[word:dhagoposh|dhagoposh]] || [[word:dhagopo|dhagopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhagopothol|dhagopothol]] || [[word:dhagopojol|dhagopojol]] || [[word:dhagoposhol|dhagoposhol]] || [[word:dhagopokol|dhagopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhagopothotho|dhagopothotho]] || [[word:dhagopojojo|dhagopojojo]] || [[word:dhagoposhosho|dhagoposhosho]] || [[word:dhagopoko|dhagopoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhagopothon|dhagopothon]] || [[word:dhagopojon|dhagopojon]] || [[word:dhagoposhon|dhagoposhon]] || [[word:dhagopokon|dhagopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhagopothoro|dhagopothoro]] || [[word:dhagopojoro|dhagopojoro]] || [[word:dhagoposhoro|dhagoposhoro]] || [[word:dhagopokoro|dhagopokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
